verses.text: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord, plans for welfare and not for evil, to give you a future and a hope.
verses.reflection: God has a purpose and plan for each of our lives. Even in difficult times, we can trust that He is working for our good.

verses.text: The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want. He makes me lie down in green pastures. He leads me beside still waters.
verses.reflection: In God's care, we find everything we need. He provides rest, peace, and guidance through life's journey.

verses.text: I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me.
verses.reflection: Our strength doesn't come from ourselves but from Christ who empowers us to face any challenge.

verses.text: Trust in the Lord with all your heart, and do not lean on your own understanding.
verses.reflection: True wisdom comes from trusting God completely, even when we don't understand His ways.

verses.text: Be strong and courageous. Do not fear or be in dread of them, for it is the Lord your God who goes with you.
verses.reflection: We can face any situation with courage because God is with us every step of the way.
